check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Windows Security >> Family Options >> Hide the Family options area is set to "Enabled"; otherwise, this is a finding.

Procedure: Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\Family options

Criteria: If the value "UILockdown" is REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.

If the value is 0, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Windows Security >> Family Options >> Hide the Family options area to "Enabled".

Click "OK".

Click "Apply".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must hide the Family options area.
